title: jasminum subhumile var. glabricymosum
intro: Jasminum subhumile var. glabricymosum, commonly known as the dwarf or prostrate jasmine, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Oleaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the risk of infection and promoting wound healing. The health benefits of Jasminum subhumile var. glabricymosum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as nausea and bloating. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in natural remedies and skincare products.
